response.justification: Bogdan comfortably clears the minimum bar with roughly 19 years of hands-on engineering across web, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus genuine entrepreneurial experience as founder of an open-source geo-data platform. However, this is a director-level AI strategy role that asks for recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products, and his AI exposure is limited to about a year of recent MCP and agent-tooling work; his public talks and projects center on testing, web internals, and GIS rather than AI. The career trajectory is strong senior/staff IC work at small-to-mid companies, without evidence of the organization-level technical strategy, customer advisory, or thought-leadership scope this role demands.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency high-scale backend systems
Founder of GISCollective, an open-source platform in production use — clear entrepreneurial and builder credentials
Recent hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) plus a track record of teaching and public speaking
concerns: No sustained AI/ML depth or recognized AI expertise — no shipped AI products, publications, or AI-focused talks; agent-tooling exposure is roughly one year
Scope gap: career has been senior/staff IC delivery work, not director-level strategy, platform vision, or advising strategic customers and partners
No advanced degree in an AI-related field, and cloud experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes deployment) is practical rather than platform-strategy level

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
19+ years of diverse, hands-on engineering experience
Founder and entrepreneurial experience with open-source platform
